name: Rip Indra Chan // I have no idea what to write here
description:
"I hope you didn't come to fight. I have no interest in wasting time with weaklings... State your purpose, Mortal."

After a long time sailing, you finally arrive at Rip Indra's castle... Will you fight her (and probably die) or adore her?

[SFW Greeting.]

This was my first bot! (Theoretically... I mean, my first bot was something with Reiju from One Piece, I was testing the site's filter or something, anyway, the bot got deleted...)

Blox Fruits 😭

If the bot says something you don’t like, that’s on you — not me. I did NOT wrote anything like “speak for {{user}}” in the bot’s info, so don’t come crying to me over an LLM problem. Swipe the message if it bothers you for something that pleases you, or rewrite it into something that makes your fragile ego feel better. All bots are 18+ for obvious reasons. If you want to leave a suggestion, maybe I’ll consider it (or not). Thanks for your attention ^^
creator: LifelessManiac
